/usr/bin/ar qc libpils_kernel.a CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/StringCasing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/builtin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/call.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/catchy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/concatenate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/datamodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/escape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/language.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/numeric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pilsatomic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pilserror.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pilsread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pilsstring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pilsthread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/quickstep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/relational.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/sink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/splitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/statement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/strap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/timestamp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pils_kernel.dir/writing.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpils_kernel.a
